name: brain-sk-statistics-charts-skills-only
description: Only Statistical Intelligence and Executive Insight Reports skills for Brain SK.
dependencyRule: Executive Insight Reports must call Statistical Intelligence first when it needs KPIs, percentages, trends, or risk scores.
provenanceRequirement: Chart Provenance & Generation Trace (mandatory) - every chart/diagram carries a 10-field Chart Provenance block; every report carries the Chart Provenance table; every report folder contains CHART_PROVENANCE.md and REPORT_GENERATION_TRACE.md. Defined in both SKILL.md files under the section 'Chart Provenance & Generation Trace (MANDATORY)'.
domainConvention: domains/shared/<skill>/SKILL.md files are short domain-entry pointers to the canonical skills/<skill>/SKILL.md (matches domains/fullstack/pr-review/SKILL.md). domains/shared/SKILL.md is the Shared domain index.

outputPaths.mirror: C:/Falcon/Brain SK/outputs (additive sync only — robocopy /E /XO, never /MIR)
